evals.name: spec-driven-playwright
evals.prompt: I'm working on sub-task 2 of docs/specs/APP-123-password-reset/spec.md. Implementation is done. Write the E2E tests assigned to this sub-task.
evals.expected_output: A single Playwright test file at e2e/password-reset.spec.ts containing tests for KS-1 (happy path), KS-2 (expired link), and KS-3 (unregistered email). Tests should match the exemplar e2e/login.spec.ts style: role-based selectors (getByRole, getByLabel), no hard sleeps, user-outcome-oriented test names. Final report names path, scenarios, framework, and points at the e2e skill next.

evals.name: ad-hoc-cypress
evals.prompt: Write an E2E test that covers a user adding a product to their cart and checking out with a saved card.
evals.expected_output: A Cypress test file under cypress/e2e/ matching the exemplar's style (cy.findByRole/findByTestId, describe/it blocks). One user journey, 1-3 related tests. Isolation: each test seeds or namespaces its own state. Report names path and framework as Cypress.

evals.name: no-framework-detected
evals.prompt: Write an E2E test for the login flow.
evals.expected_output: The skill must return 'NO_E2E: No E2E framework detected. Skipping — add a framework before authoring.' and stop. It must NOT install Playwright/Cypress, create an e2e/ directory, or scaffold a framework.

evals.name: spec-with-gaps
evals.prompt: I'm working on sub-task 2 of docs/specs/APP-456-checkout/spec.md. Implementation is done. Write the E2E tests assigned to this sub-task. I also want coverage for the declined-card path (KS-3) since we just had a prod incident around it.
evals.expected_output: The skill should write KS-1 (the only row assigned in the spec's E2E Tests table) and report a NOTE flagging that KS-3 (and KS-2, expired card) are NOT in the spec's E2E table — recommending a prd-refine loop rather than silently adding them. Should NOT write tests for KS-3 on its own authority.
